module.name: Search
module.param: | rest /services/cisco_cdr_license splunk_server=local | spath input=value | eval type=case( it=="0" AND le==0 AND se>now(),"perpetual license (purchased)", it=="0" AND le==0 AND se<=now(),"perpetual license, with expired support and maintenance", le>now() AND it=="1","trial license", le<now() AND it=="1","expired trial license", it=="0" AND le>now(),"term license (purchased)", it=="0" AND le<=now(),"expired term license", true(),"Unexpected Error (it=" + it + ")") | eval term=case(le==0,"perpetual",le<=time(),"expired " + strftime(le,"%b %d, %Y"),le>time(), strftime(le,"valid until %b %d, %Y"), true(), "unexpected error - undefined term") | eval se = if(se<=time(),"expired " + strftime(se,"%b %d, %Y"), strftime(se,"valid until %b %d, %Y")) | eval dc_expansion_threshold=round(1.3 * dc / 1000,1) * 1000 | eval license_limit= dc + " devices, up to an expansion threshold of " + dc_expansion_threshold | fillnull license_limit value="(license limit not listed)" | fields - value | appendcols [ | rest /servicesNS/nobody/cisco_cdr/configs/conf-sideview_license splunk_server=local | fields license ]

module.name: ResultsValueSetter
module.param: term le se pr it type dc license_limit c license

module.name: HTML
module.param:
Type $type$
License term $term$
Support and maintenance $se$
Product $pr$
Company name $c$
License Limit $license_limit$
License string $license$
